name: vibe-noveling
description: Complete Chinese web novel writing workflow for Claude Code — from project initialization to chapter publishing, with knowledge graph management, Save the Cat story architecture, multi-style parallel writing, and AI-slop detection.

plugins.name: vibe-noveling
plugins.description: A complete novel creation workflow with 13 integrated skills: project initialization, world/character design discussions, book-level planning (Save the Cat 15 beats), chapter outline planning, multi-style parallel writing, knowledge graph sync, AI-slop detection, name generator, snapshot management, and progress visualization.
